purpose: Materialized TorchTitan 4xMI350 throughput A/B for the retained TileLang selected-limit sparse-dKV bridge versus hot slot ordering plus accumulator slot swizzle.

target.shape: 4xMI350 TP1 PP1 CP1 FSDP4 EP4 MBS1 S4096 GBS64
target.read: The same 277 TFLOPs/GPU per-GPU gate applies to the 4x slice; node tokens/s and step time normalize by GBS.

comparison.read: The hot-order plus swizzle isolated kernel tweak does not produce a clear e2e throughput uplift. It loses the cleaner post-warmup step-2 comparison and only recovers a small step-3 difference while both runs remain far below the 277 TFLOPs/GPU target.

decision.reason: The isolated TileLang selected-limit kernel improvement is too small and late in the sparse-MLA backward boundary to dominate TorchTitan e2e throughput; bridge/materialization, MoE backward, activation checkpointing, and loss/lm-head work still hide or erase it.
decision.next_action: Do not spend more time on slot-order-only TileLang tweaks as a primary TFLOPs lever. The next TileLang branch must move earlier in the sparse-MLA backward boundary so it consumes q, dO, compressed/shared KV, LI indices, output/LSE, and sink directly, or shift back to the larger e2e walls such as MoE backward skew and activation-checkpoint recompute.

commands.control: env TARGET_HOST=do-sonle5-mi350-gpu REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 IMAGE=sonle5/nexus-titan-rocm722-mori-tilelang:20260604 RUN_ID=torchtitan_dsv4_tilelang_ab_control_4x_s4096_gbs64_steps3_20260604 GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_GBS=64 CANARY_STEPS=3 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=full CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_MAX_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_BACKWARD_MODE=shared_kv CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_KERNEL_MODULE=torchtitan.models.deepseek_v4.sparse_mla_shared_kv_triton_forward_backend CANARY_SHAREDKV_BACKWARD_MODE=explicit_tilelang_dkv CANARY_SHAREDKV_TILELANG_DKV_BACKEND=selected_limit_hsk_bf16_scaled_source CANARY_DSV4_PROFILE_SHAREDKV_BACKWARD=false CANARY_LI_KL_BACKEND=triton_tl_dot CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=true CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_SWIGLU_BACKEND=triton CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_COMBINE_INPUT_MODE=registered CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G CANARY_PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True CANARY_PYTORCH_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True experiments/2026-05-27-deepseek-v4-amd-pretrain/launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run
